rationale: Top-of-form blank labeled '(Real Name of Corporation)' — the real legal name of the corporation that is terminating its assumed/fictitious-name registration.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The corporation intends to terminate the assumed or fictitious name of ___
rationale: The specific assumed/fictitious name being terminated. This is the same canonical concept that the original (CORP_MBCA-5) registration form would populate; on the termination form, the same key identifies which prior registration is being terminated.
Date the termination statement was signed.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of any duly authorized person) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name and capacity of the signer (Shape D from filing-signer-shape convention; same as CORP_MBCA-11, LLC_MLLC-12). The asterisk-footnote allows 'any duly authorized officer OR the clerk' (§121.5).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 1
label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1. NOTE: this template uses the field-id 'Name of entitys on the submitted filings 1' (with index '1'), distinct from the more-common 'Name of entity' field-id used on later cover-letter revisions. Same canonical key.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'. NOTE: this template uses 'Check Box1/2/3' for the cover-letter expedite tier instead of the more-common 'Check Box14/15/16'. Same canonical key.
Total filing fee enclosed (USD); base $20 per page 0 header plus any expedite premium.
